We offer a powerful, easy-to-use software solution tailored for water purifier and RO service businesses across India. Our all-in-one platform helps you manage AMC renewals, customer service schedules, technician assignments, and payment tracking effortlessly. In addition, our sales automation tools help you capture and follow up with leads, manage enquiries, track quotations, and convert prospects into paying customers with minimal effort. Whether you're handling direct sales, referrals, or dealer networks, our system gives you full visibility and control over your sales pipelineâ€”helping you grow faster with better customer relationships and improved revenue.
